calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim;
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant Ismael Salazar's Claim is ordered stricken. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Pamela Underwood, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: People of the State of California; no appearance for defendant

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion to compel Answers to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents; Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories, Judicial Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this motion. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
